full_text:
Wang Shang (Wenbiao) 王商 (文表)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Shang (王商), styledWenbiao (文表), was born in Guanghan. Complied a local history, urged Liu Zhang to become more forceful. Died in office. Wang Shang was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Wang Shang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
